description_long: This is a pair of high-top sneakers with a unique, rustic design that mimics the appearance of wood and metal. The shoes feature a brown, wood-textured upper with metallic rivet accents and gray metallic eyelets for the laces. Green decorative patches with a clover motif are present on the tongue and heel, adding a pop of color and a distinctive urban flair. The laces are silver-gray and appear to be made of synthetic material, while the soles are gray with a slightly worn, textured look. The shoes have padded collars and tongues for comfort, and the overall construction suggests a blend of style and durability. The design is visually striking, blending natural and industrial elements for a standout appearance in urban environments.
description: A pair of high-top sneakers with a wood-textured brown upper, metallic accents, and green clover patches on the tongue and heel. The shoes feature silver-gray laces and gray, slightly worn soles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wood-textured upper, metallic rivets, green clover patch on the tongue, and detailed lacing.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the green decorative heel patch, padded collar, and back seam details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wood grain pattern, metallic accents, and the green heel patch.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the lacing, green clover tongue patches, and the rounded toe box.
attribute_logo: green clover emblem on tongue and heel
